opportunities.title: CVE-2026-58644: The SharePoint Zero-Day That Went From Disclosure to Exploit in Record Time
opportunities.why_now: CISA already added the actively-exploited SharePoint RCE to its KEV catalog just as SecurityWeek and The Hacker News confirm mass exploitation began almost immediately after disclosure.
opportunities.angle: Patch-cadence timeline piece: disclosure date vs. exploit date vs. patch-availability date, with a hard deadline callout for admins still unpatched

opportunities.title: CISA's Sunday Deadline: Why Unpatched FortiSandbox Bugs Are This Week's Must-Fix
opportunities.why_now: CISA is giving federal agencies days, not weeks, to patch actively exploited Fortinet FortiSandbox flaws — a rare hard deadline worth flagging before it passes.
opportunities.angle: Urgent patch-cadence alert with countdown framing and quick remediation checklist

opportunities.title: Fairlife Down: How a Single Ransomware Hit Stopped Coca-Cola's US Milk Production
opportunities.why_now: A major consumer brand halting physical production due to ransomware is a rare, concrete proof point of cyber-to-supply-chain impact.
opportunities.angle: Inevitable-breach digest entry: what happened, likely group, and the OT/production angle

opportunities.title: LegacyHive: A Fresh Windows Zero-Day Is Handing Out Admin Rights Right Now
opportunities.why_now: A newly disclosed, actively exploited Windows privilege-escalation zero-day with no official patch yet is exactly the kind of urgent item readers need flagged immediately.
opportunities.angle: Zero-day spotlight: exploitation status, affected versions, and interim mitigations while a patch is pending

opportunities.title: Inc Ransomware's SonicWall SMA Zero-Days: The Edge-Device Playbook Strikes Again
opportunities.why_now: A named ransomware group actively weaponizing zero-days in widely deployed SonicWall SMA appliances is a textbook threat-actor-plus-CVE story for the digest.
opportunities.angle: Threat-actor profile tying the exploit chain to the broader 'identity/edge-device attacks overtake exploits' trend reported this week
